requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — INTN Conformity and ANDE Project Review
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据——INTN合格评定及ANDE项目审查
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據——INTN合格評定及ANDE項目審查

summary.en: INTN is Paraguay's national technology, standardization, and metrology body and is the key reference point for Paraguayan standards and conformity activity. For solar PV inverters, the safety evidence package should be prepared around NP/IEC or direct IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence, because IEC 62109 is the internationally recognised safety framework for power converters used in photovoltaic systems. ANDE project reviewers and owners may request safety certificates or reports covering the exact inverter model or model family before accepting equipment for a grid-tied installation.
summary.zh: INTN是巴拉圭国家技术、标准化和计量机构，是巴拉圭标准及合格评定活动的关键参考点。对于太阳能光伏逆变器，安全证据包应围绕NP/IEC或直接IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备，因为IEC 62109是光伏系统用功率变换器的国际公认安全框架。ANDE项目审查方和业主可能要求覆盖确切逆变器型号或型号系列的安全证书或报告，作为接受并网装置设备的前提。
summary.zht: INTN是巴拉圭國家技術、標準化和計量機構，是巴拉圭標準及合格評定活動的關鍵參考點。對於太陽能光伏逆變器，安全證據包應圍繞NP/IEC或直接IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備，因為IEC 62109是光伏系統用功率轉換器的國際公認安全框架。ANDE項目審查方和業主可能要求覆蓋確切逆變器型號或型號系列的安全證書或報告，作為接受併網裝置設備的前提。

standards_or_laws: INTN Paraguayan standards and conformity activity, including adoption or use of international standards where applicable
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
Project-owner and ANDE documentation requirements for electrical equipment connected to the Paraguay grid

summary.en: China PV inverter safety evidence often relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic voluntary certification such as CQC or CGC, CNAS laboratory reports, and Chinese-language nameplate or user-manual review. These materials are useful for product understanding, but GB/T or NB/T evidence should not be presented as a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 unless the test report explicitly covers IEC 62109 and the relevant model configuration. The China file should also be checked for Spanish documentation needs and model-family equivalence before Paraguay submission.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器安全证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、CQC或CGC等国内自愿认证、CNAS实验室报告，以及中文铭牌或用户手册审查。这些材料有助于理解产品，但除非测试报告明确覆盖IEC 62109及相关型号配置，否则不应将GB/T或NB/T证据作为IEC 62109-1/-2的替代。提交巴拉圭前，还应检查中国文件是否需要西班牙语资料及型号系列等效说明。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器安全證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、CQC或CGC等國內自願認證、CNAS實驗室報告，以及中文銘牌或用戶手冊審查。這些材料有助於理解產品，但除非測試報告明確覆蓋IEC 62109及相關型號配置，否則不應將GB/T或NB/T證據作為IEC 62109-1/-2的替代。提交巴拉圭前，還應檢查中國文件是否需要西班牙語資料及型號系列等效說明。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification and CNAS laboratory evidence commonly used in China domestic inverter procurement

gap.en: Gap: Paraguay-facing safety evidence should be built around IEC 62109-1/-2 or NP/IEC adoption, not only China domestic GB/T or NB/T reports. Exporters should obtain or identify IEC 62109 certificates and type-test reports for the exact inverter model, verify model-family coverage, provide Spanish or bilingual safety instructions where requested, and align the safety file with the ANDE project submission and any INTN conformity route requested by the importer.
gap.zh: 差距：面向巴拉圭的安全证据应围绕IEC 62109-1/-2或NP/IEC采纳建立，而不仅是中国国内GB/T或NB/T报告。出口商应取得或识别覆盖确切逆变器型号的IEC 62109证书和型式试验报告，核实型号系列覆盖范围，在需要时提供西班牙语或双语安全说明，并使安全文件与ANDE项目提交及进口商要求的任何INTN合格评定路径保持一致。
gap.zht: 差距：面向巴拉圭的安全證據應圍繞IEC 62109-1/-2或NP/IEC採納建立，而不僅是中國國內GB/T或NB/T報告。出口商應取得或識別覆蓋確切逆變器型號的IEC 62109證書和型式試驗報告，核實型號系列覆蓋範圍，在需要時提供西班牙語或雙語安全說明，並使安全文件與ANDE項目提交及進口商要求的任何INTN合格評定路徑保持一致。

mandatory_status.target: Expected and often practically mandatory where INTN conformity, importer due diligence, ANDE project review, or owner procurement requires IEC safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 safety evidence supports China domestic review but does not automatically prove IEC 62109 compliance for Paraguay

source.publisher: INTN (Instituto Nacional de Tecnología, Normalización y Metrología)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A China domestic inverter safety file should be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 or NP/IEC evidence before Paraguay submission. Confirm INTN conformity expectations, ANDE project requirements, Spanish documentation needs, and model-family coverage before shipment or installation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国国内逆变器安全文件在提交巴拉圭前应补充IEC 62109-1/-2或NP/IEC证据。出货或安装前，请确认INTN合格评定预期、ANDE项目要求、西班牙语文件需求及型号系列覆盖范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國國內逆變器安全文件在提交巴拉圭前應補充IEC 62109-1/-2或NP/IEC證據。出貨或安裝前，請確認INTN合格評定預期、ANDE項目要求、西班牙語文件需求及型號系列覆蓋範圍。
